item.title:
clubber: Clubber @clubber · 9min James Finn with a monster score from downtown
Finn splits the posts from well out the field to

clubber: Clubber @clubber · 25min What a save by Marley Walsh
The @OfficialCorkGAA shot-stopper denies Chris Dunne from point

clubber: Clubber @clubber · 43min Liam O'Regan with a super score from an acute angle
The @OfficialCorkGAA wing forward gives
item.description:
Clubber @clubber · 43min Liam O'Regan with a super score from an acute angle
The @OfficialCorkGAA wing forward gives his side the perfect start
Watch the Electric Ireland @MunsterGAA Minor Hurling Championship LIVE on #ClubberTV 1 2 674
